comment: Single source of truth for AuditEvent.action values used in CE v0.1. Action names are lowercase, dot-separated, and stable. New action names require a contract update.
namingRules: subject is the dominant resource (agent, service, command, token, session, system)
verb is the past-tense or imperative observation (created, requested, completed, failed, revoked, ...)
qualifier is optional and disambiguates similar actions

actions.name: session.login.succeeded
actions.summary: Admin user successfully logged in.

actions.name: session.login.failed
actions.summary: Login attempt failed.

actions.name: session.logout
actions.summary: Admin user logged out.

actions.name: session.csrf.refreshed
actions.summary: Admin requested a new CSRF token.

actions.name: registration_token.created
actions.summary: Admin created a registration token.

actions.name: registration_token.revoked
actions.summary: Admin revoked a registration token.

actions.name: registration_token.consumed
actions.summary: An Agent consumed the registration token during register.

actions.name: agent.registered
actions.summary: Agent completed registration and received an AgentToken.

actions.name: agent.heartbeat.received
actions.summary: Agent heartbeat received (sampled, not every heartbeat).

actions.name: agent.disabled
actions.summary: Admin disabled an Agent.

actions.name: agent.enabled
actions.summary: Admin re-enabled an Agent.

actions.name: agent.revoked
actions.summary: Admin revoked an Agent token; the Agent must re-register.

actions.name: agent_token.issued
actions.summary: Backend issued an AgentToken in response to a successful registration.

actions.name: agent_token.rejected
actions.summary: Backend rejected an AgentToken (revoked/expired/invalid).

actions.name: service.reported
actions.summary: Agent reported (or updated) a Capsule Service manifest.

actions.name: service.retired
actions.summary: Agent reported the service as retired.

actions.name: service.action.requested
actions.summary: Admin requested an action on a Capsule Service; backend created a Command.

actions.name: command.created
actions.summary: Backend persisted a new Command (paired with service.action.requested).

actions.name: command.dispatched
actions.summary: Agent polled and received the Command.

actions.name: command.started
actions.summary: Agent reported startedAt.

actions.name: command.completed
actions.summary: Agent reported successful CommandResult.

actions.name: command.failed
actions.summary: Agent reported failure CommandResult.

actions.name: system.agent.offline
actions.summary: agent-offline-sweep transitioned an Agent to OFFLINE.

actions.name: system.service.stale
actions.summary: service-stale-sweep transitioned a service to STALE.

actions.name: system.command.expired
actions.summary: command-ttl-sweep transitioned a Command to EXPIRED.

actions.name: system.bootstrap.completed
actions.summary: First-run bootstrap created the default workspace and admin.

actions.name: user.created
actions.summary: Admin created a new user.

actions.name: user.updated
actions.summary: Admin updated a user's role or status.

actions.name: user.password.reset
actions.summary: Admin reset a user's password.

actions.name: command.cancelled
actions.summary: Admin cancelled a pending or running Command.

actions.name: maintenance.triggered
actions.summary: Admin manually triggered a maintenance run.

actions.name: maintenance.run
actions.summary: Scheduled maintenance run completed.

actions.name: backup.sqlite.created
actions.summary: Admin created a SQLite backup.
